text: Graduation result mein itna low CGPA aur back papers dekh kar Bapuji ne phone cut kiya aur do din se baat nahi kar rahe. Main Mukherjee Nagar ke apne chhote se kamre mein bilakh raha hoon, UPSC ki kitabein samne hain par dimaag bilkul sunn pad gaya hai. Ek multi-year dropper hone ki sharam aur is 'sarkari babu' banne ke bojh ne mujhe itna ghabra diya hai ki saans lena mushkil ho gaya hai, aage kya karunga kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

Papa ne mera university ka result dekha jisme low CGPA aur attendance shortage thi, aur tabse unki chuppi ne mujhe andar se khokhla kar diya hai. Sharma ji ke bete ka rank nikal gaya aur main joint family ki itni investment ke baad bhi ek dropper hi reh gaya, jiska B.A. ka cutoff tak theek nahi. Mujhe aage optional padhne ya make-up exam dene ka koi hosh nahi hai, bas farsh par gir kar rone ka mann kar raha hai aur main completely blank hoon.

PSC preparation ke beech jab mere distance degree mein low CGPA aayi, toh Papa ne gaali dene ke bajaye jo khamoshi saadh li, usne meri aatma kaanp di. Coaching institute mein sab mock test de rahe hain aur main yahan back paper ke darr aur family ki mitti mein milti 'izzat' soch kar thar-thar kaanp raha hoon. Dimaag itna overflood ho chuka hai ki re-eval ka form bharne ki himmat nahi hai, bas ghutan ho rahi hai aur rona ruk nahi raha.

Jab Papa ko pata chala ki lagatar UPSC fail hone ke baad ab meri PG mein bhi back aayi hai aur CGPA low hai, toh unhone mujhe completely ignore karna shuru kar diya. Kota se shuru hua mera ye dropper ka safar ab itna bhari ho gaya hai ki main hostel room mein lock hoke bas ro raha hoon, mujhe lagne laga hai ki 'kuch nahi hoga mera'. Ye soch mujhe itna paralyse kar rahi hai ki main aage ki notes banane ya koi back paper clear karne ke bare mein soch hi nahi pa raha.

Bapuji ki us dead silence ne mujhe pagal kar diya hai, meri graduation mein aayi low CGPA dekh kar unhone asha chhod di hai. Sarkari naukri ke liye maine saalo gaon se door coaching hub mein guzare, par ab is back paper ki wajah se lag raha hai mera wajood hi khatam ho gaya hai. Main kal ke test series ka ya supplementary ka kuch nahi soch pa raha, mera dimaag bas fatne wala hai aur is sharam ne mujhe jhakjhor ke rakh diya hai.
